allow: PowerShell(cd 'c:\\Proyectos\\illo'; Get-ChildItem -File | Where-Object {$_.Extension -match '\\.\(css|js|md|html\)$'} | Select-Object Name, @{Name="Tamaño";Expression={"{0:N0} KB" -f \($_.Length/1KB\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./chapters/chapter2-edu.json'\); console.log\('OK scenes:', c.scenes.length\); c.scenes.forEach\(s=>console.log\(' -', s.title, '| lines:', s.lines.length\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const c=require\('./chapters/chapter2-tony.json'\); const last=c.scenes[c.scenes.length-1]; console.log\('Título última escena:', last.title\); const idx=last.lines.findIndex\(l=>l.choices\); console.log\('Línea con choices, idx', idx\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(last.lines[idx],null,1\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); new Function\(fs.readFileSync\('game.js','utf8'\).replace\('const engine','var engine'\)\); console.log\('game.js OK'\)")
